title: ANAN Kicks Against ICAN’s Amendment, Says It’s an Attempt to Monopolize Profession - FinancialEDGE
description: The Association of National Accountants of Nigeria (ANAN) has rejected the ongoing amendment of some sections of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN) establishment Act. ANAN said if the amendment is allowed to sail through, it would cause rivalry among professional bodies in Nigeria. The President of ANAN, Dr. James Ekerare Neminebor, stated
html: The Association of National Accountants of Nigeria (ANAN) has rejected the ongoing amendment of some sections of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN) establishment Act.
